Uses of Class
org.docgene.model.XMLTableCell

  • Packages that use XMLTableCell 
    Package Description
    org.docgene.api
    This package allows to generate a wiki in another application, using the docGenerator API.
    org.docgene.model
    Contains the documentation model.

    • Uses of XMLTableCell in org.docgene.api

      Methods in org.docgene.api that return XMLTableCell 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XMLTableCell DocGeneratorAPI.addTableCell(XMLTableRow trow)
      Add a table cell.
      XMLTableCell DocGeneratorAPI.addTableCell(XMLTableRow trow, java.lang.String sentence)
      Add a table cell.
      XMLTableCell DocGeneratorAPI.addTableCell(XMLTableRow trow, java.lang.String sentence, SentenceStyle style)
      Add a table cell.

    • Uses of XMLTableCell in org.docgene.model

      Subclasses of XMLTableCell in org.docgene.model 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  XMLTableColumn
      Represent a table column.
      Methods in org.docgene.model that return XMLTableCell 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      XMLTableCell XMLTableRow.addEmptyCell()
      Add an empty cell to the table row.
      XMLTableCell XMLTableRow.getCell(int index)
      Return the cell at a specified index.
      Methods in org.docgene.model that return types with arguments of type XMLTableCell 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.List<XMLTableCell> XMLTableRow.getCells()
      Return the cells in the table row.
      Methods in org.docgene.model with parameters of type XMLTableCell 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int XMLTableRow.addCell(XMLTableCell cell)
      Add a cell to the table row.
      char XMLTable.getAlignment(XMLTableCell cell)
      Return the alignment of the cell in the table.
      XMLTableColumn XMLTable.getColumn(XMLTableCell cell)
      Return the column associated with a cell.
